chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 210 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.11.2025. Mr. Zulqarnain Talpur, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Zai, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = The applicant Syed Qudrat Ali Shah is aggrieved by order dated 10.04.2025 passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad, who on the application of complainant / respondent No.3 Mst. Sana Umar Shaikh based on the video evidence available before him directed the police authorities to record her statement and take further action in accordance with law. Syed Qudrat Ali Shah has approached this Court aggrieved by the order passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. As articulated in the order and by this bench has also seen the contents of the video as well as the counsel for the applicant has also seen the same. On the basis of information available in the video, I do not find any defect in the impugned order dated 10.04.2025 passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed with reminder to the counsel to render assistance to the Court within the frame work of PLD 2001 Karachi 60. JUDGE Tufail
